subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter hath arrived and the matter concerning Jackson hath become known. This house Jackson [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید قضیه جاکسون معلوم گردید این خانه را جاکسون
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @business; financial; property matters, @wisdom [hikmat]
